title: Robert Lloyd
compiled_truth: Robert Lloyd is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2000-12-06), Robert Lloyd sent 56 and received 209 emails, totalling 265 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (56), [Pat Clynes](people/pat-clynes) (46), [Lee Papayoti](people/lee-papayoti) (25), [Howard Camp](people/howard-camp) (21), [Gary Hanks](people/gary-hanks) (19).
